query: SELECT a.name, a.id as alunoId, ap.id as pdiId, ap.trilhaId, t.name as trilhaNome, ac.id as compId, c.nome as competenciaNome, ac.nivelAtual, ac.metaFinal, ac.metaCiclo1, ac.metaCiclo2 FROM alunos a JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ap.alunoId = a.id JOIN assessment_competencias ac ON ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id JOIN competencias c ON c.id = ac.competenciaId LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON t.id = ap.trilhaId WHERE a.name LIKE '%Bruno%' ORDER BY ap.id, ac.id LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT a.name, a.id as alunoId, ap.id as pdiId, ap.trilhaId, t.name as trilhaNome, ac.id as compId, c.nome as competenciaNome, ac.nivelAtual, ac.metaFinal, ac.metaCiclo1, ac.metaCiclo2 FROM alunos a JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ap.alunoId = a.id JOIN assessment_competencias ac ON ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id JOIN competencias c ON c.id = ac.competenciaId LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON t.id = ap.trilhaId WHERE a.name LIKE '%Bruno%' ORDER BY ap.id, ac.id LIMIT 20;
